title: thymus schimperi subsp. schimperi
intro: Thymus schimperi subsp. schimperi is a plant species belonging to the Thymus genus, commonly known as the Schimperi thyme or Eritrean thyme. It is native to the Horn of Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system, likely due to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. Thymus schimperi subsp. schimperi can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil for medicinal use, as well as being used in culinary dishes to add flavor and aroma.
